properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When your dreams don't come true And you don't know what to do Wondering how life could be so cruel I have felt the pain like you And I have made it through By holding on to Someone Who wants to hold you too

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is hope in the night When the darkness hides the day There's hope for your heart When the fears hide your faith Listen to the One who says Everything will be alright Don't give up, There is hope in the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There are tears in your eyes From all the pain inside You can't see the rainbow through the rain The sun will shine again Your broken heart will mend Joy is in the morning So just hang on'til then

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Look beyond the hopelessness you'll see Oh, pray to God above and just believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is hope in the night When the darkness hides the day There's hope for your heart When the fears hide your faith Listen to the One who says Everything will be alright Don't give up, don't give up Don't give up, There is hope in the night
